description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular structure with a wood-textured base and a large glass display area at the front, allowing visibility of interior items such as small potted plants. The upper section is topped with a flat wooden roof and a prominent black awning, which displays the word 'LOGO' in white, spaced letters. In front of the main kiosk is a matching wood-textured counter or podium, also marked with a circular 'LOGO' sign. The side panels are primarily glass, framed by wood, providing additional visibility into the kiosk's interior. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on natural wood finishes and transparent surfaces. The kiosk is likely intended for retail or promotional use in urban environments, such as sidewalks or plazas.
description: A modern wood-and-glass kiosk with a black awning labeled 'LOGO' and a matching front counter, featuring large display windows and a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display area, black awning with 'LOGO', and the separate wood-textured counter with a circular 'LOGO' sign.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the kiosk, the overhanging awning, and the glass side panel; the counter is positioned separately in front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood-textured back panel with no windows or signage visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the glass side panel, overhanging awning, and the separate counter.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo; white letters 'LOGO' on black awning above display, circular 'LOGO' on front counter.
attribute_window_presence: Three large rectangular windows: one at the front, one on each side panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat wooden roof with a projecting black awning at the front.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with natural wood and glass elements.
